summary:
SEEKING SPIRITUAL BREAKTHROUGH AND RENEWAL: Brandon discusses the numerous requests he receives from families seeking breakthroughs for their loved ones. Brandon emphasizes the necessity of receiving a fresh outpouring of the Holy Spirit rather than relying on stale religious experiences. Brandon explains the concept of new wineskins, stating that the anointing oil of the Holy Spirit makes a person pliable and capable of holding new wine without breaking. Brandon states a strong desire to continuously reflect the glory of the Father and demonstrate God's nature to others.

WARNING OF A COMING DIVINE SHAKING: Brandon issues a warning about a great shaking that is coming to awaken people. Brandon compares his message to that of Jeremiah, sounding an alarm to urge individuals to get their houses in order. Brandon clarifies that this impending event is not a form of divine judgment, but rather the corrective action of a loving Father directing a wayward child back to the right path. Brandon notes that God extends mercy and time to bring unsaved loved ones back into the fold, emphasizing that all things are possible for those who believe.

BIBLICAL GIVING AND TITHING PRINCIPLES: Brandon details his and Diana's personal beliefs regarding tithing and financial sowing. Brandon explains that giving must cost something, referencing biblical figures, and asserts that believers should sow financial seeds to reap a harvest. Brandon advises giving to the local church or the specific ministries that provide spiritual nourishment, describing these places as the spiritual storehouse. While acknowledging that believers are under the New Covenant and not subject to the curses of the Old Covenant, Brandon states that giving prompts God to bring financial blessings and a multiplied return. Brandon warns against being manipulated into giving out of emotion, stressing that all financial contributions should be strictly led by the Holy Spirit.

OVERCOMING THE MAILBOX MENTALITY WITH ACTION: Brandon criticizes the mailbox mentality where individuals passively wait for miraculous financial provision without taking practical action. Brandon recounts a personal story from the early two thousands when he followed a divine prompting to buy a broken car, fix the timing belt, and sell it for a significant profit to a specific buyer. Brandon uses this example to encourage people to ask God for creative wealth-building ideas and to actively put their hands to work, mentioning business avenues like online reselling. Brandon emphasizes that God blesses the work of a person's hands and that believers should seek practical promotions or business ideas rather than treating faith like a lottery ticket or cryptocurrency gamble.

RESTORING BALANCE AND PRAYING FOR NATIONS: Brandon states that God is raising up new leaders to bring balance, structure, and clarity back to the church by eliminating extreme teachings. Brandon declares the year 2025 as a time of turnaround and open doors for believers to break free from poverty and bondage. Brandon directs prayers toward national and global matters, specifically mentioning upcoming elections in Canada, Australia, and Zimbabwe. Brandon prays for the removal of leftist leadership in Canada and for God to guide President Trump and JD Vance, asking for supernatural protection and a divine visitation in the White House. Brandon also prays against corruption, abortion, dementia, drug addictions, and sexual perversions, calling for the restoration of marriages and a massive revival.
rawData: [April 12, 2025]-[Should people tithe]-[https://youtu.be/tc6VEcMn8BY]-[Hey, good morning, family. Thank you for joining us again today. We're going to pray over your needs today. There are many of you, like this family right here, who are believing for so much. We received that in the mail today, and I'm just like, 'Wow.' There are so many of you believing for a breakthrough for your loved ones. I mean, I have other photos right here. There are so many families. Like I said, we have photos now all over our car. We drive around and look like we have photos everywhere that we pray over when we're driving around. People send them to us, and they need a breakthrough. These people are desperate; they need a touch from the Father. They don't need a stale word from a pastor where you go on a Wednesday night or a Sunday and you walk away thinking, 'What was that? Why did I waste my thirty minutes? Why did I waste an hour? I could have gotten more watching a YouTube video than I got from that.' I don't want to waste people's time. I say, 'God, we need a fresh river. We need fresh glory.' We need to get this old vinegar out of these old wineskins and put the anointing of the Holy Ghost on us. Rub that oil down into that pouch of who we are, that vessel, making it pliable again. Because when you put that anointing oil on that vessel and rub it in, making that leather pouch pliable again, it makes it so if you put the new wine in it, it won't crack and bust. The oil and the anointing of the Holy Ghost is what makes us brand new every single day. You have to have that glory—the outward honey glow. That's why I told Diana—we talk about it all the time—I want it so much that it never turns off, that they have to put a drape around my head because people ask, 'What is going on with that dude's face? He's glowing with the glory.' I tell my children, 'We represent the Father.' So, we act like the Father; we demonstrate ourselves as the Father would. I know we're all a work in progress, but I'm just desperate for Him. I'm desperate for Him. And I know what's coming. I know a great shaking is coming to awaken you. And I will sound the alarm, just like Jeremiah, to tell you all that God is coming. And you have to get your house in order because we're running out of time. Thank God we're not like we were back then; we're under more grace. I get it, but I'm telling you all, a great shaking is coming. What's coming is not God's judgment. Ladies and gentlemen, what's coming is not judgment; it's a Father correcting a child who is spoiled. It's the Father who is correcting a child who has gone wayward, saying, 'You've gone off the road, buddy, and I want you to come back over here in the fold.' The ninety-nine sheep are over here, and you're the one, and I'm trying to snatch that one. There are a lot of ones, but He's trying to grab a hold of those ones. And He's like, 'You got way off track, and you're fifty miles away from where you're supposed to be. But I have more mercy and more love to let you have an extended time to bring them in.' Your unsaved loved ones—the people who are so wayward that you think, 'Man, they're never coming in.' No, all things are possible to him who believes. Ladies and gentlemen, glory to God! All things are possible to him who believes. You've just got to believe it. You've got to put your faith into motion. What are you believing for today? You say, 'Well, I'm believing for finances.' Then sow a seed. Every seed produces after its own kind. What are you believing God for today? David said, 'I give nothing that doesn't cost me something. If it doesn't cost you something, then it isn't precious to you.' And David gave when it hurt, and the Bible says that. And that's where I've tried to say, 'What's my chokehold? Where am I at with the Lord concerning this?' People say, 'I don't believe in tithing because it's under the Old Covenant.' I believe in giving God something to work with. I believe in giving God—if the farmer sows a seed to reap a harvest, then I'm going to sow a seed to reap a harvest. If I have a need, I sow a seed. That's what we always do in this household. Where do you give? You give to your local church. You give to where you're being fed spiritually. You give to the people who are pouring into you spiritually; that's where you give. So, where your pastor is and where the people are who are ministering to you on a day-to-day basis—those are the people you give to. Why? Because that's what keeps the local church going. If you don't have a local church in your area, you have to have a prayer covering. That's what changes things. When that body comes together, you come as an army in that community. So, you keep that local church going. You keep the people who are feeding you going so that they keep feeding you, so they are able to distribute out and help others. It's like a storehouse. You bring your tithe to the storehouse. You bring that to the storehouse. Where the storehouse is, is where you're getting fed. That's where the grain is, and all the things you put in the storehouse. You bring the tithe to the storehouse. Your local church is your storehouse where you're getting fed. You take care of that pastor; you take care of them, and then you make sure they're able to have community outreach or whatever they're doing. I just believe that that's what we do in these last days to help the local church out. We help it. You say, 'Well, we don't have to tithe.' No, but you still give. I don't believe there's a curse on people if you don't tithe, okay, but I believe that God said He rebukes the devourer for our sake. And if He did it back then, He'll do it again. And I want a blessing on my money. I want prosperity and His blessing on it—my heart hearing Him say, 'Brandon, well done, thou good and faithful servant. You did everything you could; you helped stretch the Kingdom of God throughout the whole world.' Most people don't want to give. Most people are stingy with it, and they say, 'Well, when I get more money, I'll give and do this and that.' No, we started tithing because we had to. I don't know why I got off on this; I guess it's because Braden told me something. We get some emails where people say, 'We don't believe in tithing. What do you believe about it?' Well, this is my opinion: I believe in tithing. I believe in giving my ten percent. I believe in giving over the ten percent as much as I can because I know what it takes to get the gospel out. It seems like I've worked for churches my whole life. We knew what it took to get the bills paid at the church; we knew what it took to get the flyers out and all the staff paid. It takes millions of dollars. Most people say, 'Well, I gave my ten bucks.' Well, the church was thankful for the ten dollars, but there were a lot of tippers. You're believing that you can step into the overflow, for God to speak to you about abundant things, but that comes out of whether He can trust you with it. If God can't trust you with the ten percent that you have to tithe to Him, He's not going to show you the greater works. I'm telling you, I'm just being real with you all. I'm just telling you all the facts, and most people don't want to hear it. You say, 'Well, I'm qualified because I gave my five bucks to the Lord today.' You tipped God. You made a quarter of a million dollars last year, and you gave ten dollars. Whoop-de-do! I mean, I'm just saying. You think that you're qualified for God to tell you the secret things because you gave your hundred bucks and you made $250,000 last year? Seriously, it comes out of sacrifice. David said, 'I didn't give God anything that didn't cost me something.' So you are expecting God to pour out his blessing on you in a dump truck load, but you gave in a thimble load. And you're asking God to do something mightily in your finances whenever it's so backwards is what I'm trying to tell y'all. Seek ye first the kingdom and his righteousness, and all these things will be added unto you. Give, and it shall be given unto you: good measure, pressed down, shaken together, and running over will men give into your bosom. And so that's just what Diana and I believe. You ask us or tell you, I don't like talking about money stuff because you're like, 'Well, you know you're after money.' No, I don't care; I honest to goodness don't care. This is because people ask me, 'What do you believe about this, Brandon?' And this is what Diana and I believe. We believe in the power of the seed. We believe in the power that you give and it shall be given unto you: good measure, pressed down, shaken together, and running over will men give into your bosom. That's what Diana and I believe. We believe that God is a rewarder of those that diligently seek Him. Not just with my time and prayer, but seeking Him with my finances. God, if I give, you said that you give me 30, 60, 100-fold. That's what you said in your word. You said in Malachi—I'm not putting myself underneath the old covenant, Lord—but you said back then that you rebuke the devourer for my sake. So Father, how much more will you rebuke the devourer for my sake now? I'm not underneath the old covenant, but I'm underneath the new, but I still want to believe in the blessing. I still want to believe in helping the church out. And it's a heart thing. It's a heart thing. And I say, 'God, my heart is for you. My heart is for the gospel. I want to help Billy Burke out. I want to help missionaries out. I want to help them.' If you're going out and praying for the sick and seeing people recover, I would like to help you. If I see that you're doing something major for God, I want to help you. I see the cause, I see the anointing, and you sow into the anointing. Do you give all at one place? No, I split my seed a lot of times and I help each ministry out. I help pastors, prophets, teachers, evangelists, and all this. And I try, even if it's just five bucks whatever, until you grow. You say, 'Here, here, here.' But I try to sow the big one. And then the one that feeds me the most I give them the most, right, because I'm getting impartation from it. Above tithe I try to help out. So that's what I'm trying to say. And maybe that'll make sense for some of y'all, but you ask me my opinion, what Diana and I do. And that's exactly what we've done. And we've done it for a while now saying, 'God help me because I'm not going to be manipulated.' 'Well, all your tithe should come to my church because you're a part of my flock and you need to give all your money here.' Whatever I'm going to do, I'm going to do what the Holy Spirit tells me to do. And people get ticked off about that, but whatever. I just follow the voice of the Lord for our life. And what he tells me to do is I give it. If you're not underneath the curse of the old covenant and it's not there, then I'm not going to be manipulated about my tithe either. I will not sit there and have you tell me all this stuff where I should be giving my money. I will follow the Holy Spirit and he will show me that which is to come. And when you do that and you're led by the Holy Spirit you'll always be blessed. Follow the Holy Spirit in what the word tells you to do. Give to where you're being fed. Give to the ministries that are feeding you. And I'm telling you, God will anoint you. Be led by the spirit of God when it comes to your giving. There's a lot of different theories; there's a lot of different theologies when it comes to this. And everybody's about it because everybody wants the money. And I'll be real with you, that's what I've seen a lot in the body of Christ. A lot of people want the money and they go, 'I feel that if you give this $58 seed and this $58 blessing you're going to get a miracle.' I don't get into all that stuff. I just give where I'm led to give to help when God tells me to give. And that's exactly what Diana and I do. And I am not manipulated by emotion. Never give out of emotion. Give by the spirit of the Lord leading you. Does that make sense? If you're led by your emotions, your emotions change all the time. You can give a seed and you'll be like, 'Why in the world did I just give that?' five minutes later. Sometimes it's the devil trying to torment you, but sometimes it is because you acted out in flesh. And I'm not going to be, 'Well, you know, I heard the sob story about that and it was really sad at church and I gave it.' I'm not going to give out of emotion. I'm giving by the spirit of God leading me. Does that make sense? When you're led by the spirit of the Lord there is a blessing behind it. But there truly is a 30, 60, and 100-fold. And you find the 100-fold grounds, you found a nugget. If you find the 60-fold, you still found a really good one. Thirty is okay; it's a return. But I'm serious, I told the Lord, I said, 'Where is the 100-fold ground? Show me how to sow into that because I want to be the farmer that sows into the manure that gets back the big harvest. I sow to reap, I sow.' They said, 'Well, do you give to get?' Well, yeah, basically, but I'm not giving it out of that attitude. I'm giving to sow because God says he loves a cheerful giver, but he gives back 30, 60. It's his system. So I'm sowing into it saying, 'God, show me how to reap the maximum reward.' And if this is stony ground, run. 'Well, their ministry died.' Well, it wasn't me, it's stony ground. It doesn't need to be there anyway. I mean, I'm just being real. Let them move on and do something else. Sell on eBay; it's a good living. If their ground is stony they shouldn't be in ministry anyway. If it's sandy soil and it's bad soil, why are they preaching then? Close the doors down and go on. We need people that are filled with and controlled by the Holy Ghost in these last days. We don't need to be wasting people's time just doing it because it's all that I've ever known how to do. Do something else. Be a door greeter at Walmart. I mean, I don't mean to be rude but that's just real. Don't waste my time. And that's why I don't want to waste your time. We're just real. I've seen it all. I've been around some big ministers, some of the big guys. And you look at them and you go, 'What's real and what's not? Is there an anointing here or not?' I want you all to be successful. I want you to go from glory to glory and not keep going around the mountain expecting different results every single time. For 40 years they wandered in the wilderness. For 40 years they wandered and they never said, 'Why am I still going through what we're going through?' 'Moses, why are we still walking around this mountain?' And you go through another year and he's like, 'Well, the whole generation has to die because of unbelief and we're going to raise up the Joshuas and the Calebs to go and take the land because we really aren't the size of grasshoppers to these giants.' We're going to go and take the land. Who wants to be a land grabber? Us! I don't want to live in the valley of the shadow of death anymore. I want to live on the high peaks with Jesus Christ in these last days. I want to know how to go from glory to glory to glory. I'm so tired. You listen to all these sermons and you hear them and you know, is this really working? I want to see it. I want to see fruit. When your mom and dad and great-grandparents, and they all live from paycheck to paycheck and you give because they can preach the money out of your wallet and they get you all excited about it, and you walk away and you're still broke. You're still broke and it's frustrating and you go and you listen to it and you hear the prosperity gospel and you hear all this stuff. And God is a God that is abundantly rewarding those that diligently seek him. And he wants you to have 30, 60, and 100-fold, but you're giving it into bad ground. And you walk away going, 'What gives, Lord? How come you haven't met my stuff?' Because we're still looking for the mailbox mentality. We're looking for, "Well, God, where's my angel with the bag of money in his hand?" like that preacher talked about. I'm telling you that I've heard of miracles happening, and God does that, ladies and gentlemen. And God will do that; it's an exception, not the rule. He will anoint your hands to prosper. He will abundantly bless your hands to do something. Put your boat into motion. God isn't looking for the talents; you could either bury the talents, or you can make the talents work for you by doing something with your hands, asking Him for a creative idea to get wealth. "God, show me how to get this." I was the guy, I'm telling you, for a long time. As a janitor sitting back there, I was going, "Lord, Lord, teach me how some sister will walk up and give me $100 today because we're desperate for it." And that's a miracle for someone to hear it on their heart to give you some money, but God wants to make you a fisherman to go out and get it yourself. Teach me how to do it. And that's whenever the Lord told me, "Brennan, I'll teach you how to flip cars. Go out and buy this car that's broken over here, and pay your dad or whoever to put that timing belt on that car and fix it, and you can make it." I'm telling you, listen, I bought a car for, I think it was like 500 bucks—you weren't even born yet—and the Lord said, "Buy that car; it just needs a new timing belt on it and it's going to run." I bought it for 500 bucks and I sold it for $3,000. But at that time, that $500 seed for that car that needed a new timing belt—Of course, there was nothing else wrong with this car, and this was a long time ago—that $3,000 was a lot of money to us. So He said, "A man with a white shirt... after you fix this car, a man with a white shirt..." I prayed in the spirit. The Lord said, "A man with a white shirt is going to knock on your door tomorrow, and he's going to buy the car because the for-sale sign was on it." This Hispanic man walked up; he had a white shirt on just like the Lord said, and he said, "I've come to buy the car. I have cash." He gave me the cash. That's what I'm saying. This was back in 2002, 2003, somewhere around there. So, what I'm trying to say is just follow the voice of the Lord for your life, not looking for a mailbox mentality, but asking God to bless whatever you put your hands to and saying, "Lord, teach me. Teach me." That's just an example, but that's what we do still with eBay and Poshmark, asking God to give you an idea. The only reason I do what I do now is because I don't have much education; I just go, "Lord, teach me how to do this." And the Holy Spirit will lead you and guide you into everything. I just know there's a lot of people frustrated with preachers and teachers of the gospel. They're blessed, and people see it and they go, "Well..." because you get all these people bashing preachers that have everything and they go, "How come they have so much?" Well, you know, God's blessed them. They've sown their seed, they've reaped it. But it comes across—people become frustrated and critical over it and they go, "Where's mine?" Get out and do something with your harvest. Do something with your hands. Look for that supernatural idea. I believe in miracle money, but I don't believe in it the way everybody else believes in it like that. I believe God will anoint you to do something. He'll give you an idea. But there's a lot of it I believe that has been off, and a lot of the body of Christ is still believing 50 years later, and they're still living in the slums. And I've learned if you put your boat into motion and ask the Father, by seeking His face, for Him to anoint what you put your hands to, God will bless you. God will bless you with an idea. Believe for a promotion at your job. If you love your job and you want to stay there, then believe for a promotion. Some people go, "Well, I don't care if I ever have anything." Then fine, this message isn't for you. But there's a lot of people that are believing for a lot, and they're still doing the same thing. 50 years later, they're still giving, they're still doing what they're doing, and they've sacrificed their whole life looking for the pot of gold at the end of the rainbow. And they're looking for that lottery ticket. And God's not a lottery ticket. God is a God that will bless your hands and He'll cause increase, but I've never seen the lottery ticket stuff. I'm telling you all, a lot of people treat crypto like that, and I'm not going to be one of those. I do it and I pretend I sow it—put my money in it and then I walk away and act like it's not there. I do not act like I'm putting my last dollar in there believing for this—I need lucky 777. It's going to be all that I need to get through this next life, to make me retire. No. "Father, give me ideas. Anoint me to do something supernatural for You." And as I seek You and I seek Your face, You said You'd give me what's in Your hand. And God's going to give those rewards as He gives ideas and He speaks to you in the midnight hour. Let me pray for you all, though. I'm going to believe for your financial miracle. I'm going to believe God for your healings. We're going to believe for Canada. So, Father, we just thank You for Your hand on every single one of these people. My job is never to cause confusion. My job—I'm trying so hard, Father, to teach them how to get out of the holes, Father, so that they don't keep going down the mental anguish of what they've done 10 years ago, expecting different results and going, "Well, seed time, harvest... where's my harvest?" and they've never seen what they're believing for. And yet they sow into bad ground over and over again, expecting different results, and they're going, "What's going on with my life?" Lord, I would—in my time back then—I wish somebody would have said something, not hearing another sermon, but just somebody being real. And Father, I want to be that real person that they can just have someone to say, like a friend that says, "Listen, this is off. There's some off stuff here. There's some things that are not right, and we've got to get it right because I don't want to live in the slums anymore; I want to live and come up higher." And I know, Father, there's frustration with a lot of people. We see their emails. There's frustration in the body of Christ. There's dysfunction. And Father, I know You said that You're bringing forth the new Davids. You're bringing forth the new generals that will bring a balance to things. You're bringing a balance to the Word. You're bringing a balance to things that have been off, that have been way over in left field, and You're saying, "Let's bring it back to home base." And Father, I thank You that You're bringing back clarity to the body of Christ, that there will be some balance in here, not so much weirdness. There's going to be some structure, and in the structure, it's all back in the Word and it's in the anointing. And You said that You came to set the captives free. And I believe, Father, that there's a lot of the body of Christ that needs to be set free. They're walking with the yoke of bondage of poverty, lack, not enough, barely getting by. They've got the bondage over their minds so that they don't think clearly. And Father, I thank You, Lord, that they think clearly. They know exactly what they're supposed to do when they're supposed to do it. They hear Your voice, and a stranger's voice they will not follow. And Father, they're going to know exactly where to put their money. I believe, Father, that this is the day of the open door, that this will be a time that they set their path right. That 2025 will be a time that they get on track, they get on the right road, going the right direction, knowing exactly what God has for them. And they're not going to go the wrong direction, going on the bad road, going, "Why am I not getting to where I'm supposed to be year after year? I'm in bondage." Father, it is not your will for people to be derailed in their lives; it's your will for them to go up higher with you, with the fire. Father, for them to see your face, to know you, and to find you. I thank you, Father, that you're not hiding from us; you're just waiting on us. You're saying, 'Brandon, come up higher in your thinking, in the way you pray, and in the way you do things.' Because that's where I'm at. I'm not down here with the chickens; I'm up here. I thank you, Lord, that we come up higher in our ability to believe you for more. We believe that in 2025 we will soar; it's a 2025 turnaround. This will be a year like we've never seen before, where we go through the open door, and in this window of opportunity and blessing, we are the people who have exceedingly abundantly above all that we dare ask or think. I thank you, Father, for healings, for demonstrations, and manifestations of the glory on our lives. Father, we don't keep walking around saying and believing things that are off; we believe what the Word says. You said that we are snared by the words of our mouth, so we say that we are blessed: blessed in the city, blessed in the field, blessed coming in, and blessed going out. God, you're a healer, the God of more than enough who heals us by the stripes of Jesus. We believe, Father, that you already paid the price for us to walk in divine health; we don't have to walk in a busted-up life. Father, you paid the price for us to walk in exceedingly abundantly above all that we ask or think. I thank you that our cup overflows with your glory today. Father, we pray over all these elections and over all the people who are believing for their countries to turn around. You said in your word that if we humble ourselves and pray and turn from our wicked ways, you would heal our land. Father, I thank you that you're healing our land today. I thank you, Father, that you're guiding President Trump and getting rid of the leftist party out of the Canadian leadership. Righteous people will rise up and vote, and the vote will be too big to rig. In the name of Jesus, we call for a supernatural election in Canada, Australia, and Zimbabwe. There are so many countries having elections this year; we call forth a major turnaround for this last outpouring of the Spirit of the Lord. Father, raise up men and women of God to run for office to do mighty works for you, to make good laws and turn around the laws that are corrupt regarding abortion and dark things. I thank you, Lord, that you're bringing forth the righteous in a mighty army to raise up and say, 'Enough is enough.' Even the unbelievers who do not see because they have a reprobate mind, their minds will come to them and they'll say, 'I'm going to vote right; I don't want to live underneath this. This is not going right.' Father, they would get on the path of shaking to awaken them. I thank you, Lord, for the glory and that everything we put our hands to prospers. I thank you, Lord, that our marriages are restored. I call forth restoration over our homes and families. Father, for the husbands and wives who are wayward, they'll come back to you. In the name of Jesus, we bless them and call them whole and well. People will seek and find you, Father, as we call those things that be not as though they were. We say they're healed, whole, and set free from drug addictions and sexual perversions. Father, they have the mind of Christ, and no dementia comes nigh these people anymore. We speak to dementia to go now in Jesus' name. We thank you, Lord, that you are the restorer of what the cankerworm is trying to eat up. In the name of Jesus, everything the devil meant for bad, you said you're going to turn it around for good. We believe, Father, that you're the healer and the deliverer to those who believe. We're calling their circumstances to turn right now. Everything that was bad over the night will be good in the morning. Father, we thank you for revival. You're leaving the ninety-nine to go after the one. There will be a major outpouring of your Spirit in a way like we've never seen before. This will be a time for a great shaking. Your Son is coming soon. Oh Lord, we give you praise for everyone believing for breakthrough today. We believe you're the God of the breakthrough. It's time to walk through and have a breakthrough in your life. Father, we thank you that they're no longer going around that mountain; they're coming out to conquer their mountains by speaking to them. They're speaking to that mountain and telling it to be dissolved and cast into the sea. Thank you, Lord, for stirring in every single one of their hearts today. They're stirred up and excited about life. In the name of Jesus, there's no more confusion or bondage. We thank you for President Trump, that you put a hedge of protection around him, JD Vance, and their families. Father, they would know you on a supernatural level and have a glorious visitation in the White House. Do you believe that, Braden? Congress, the Senate, and the House will have a glorious visitation. We thank you for the glory and that you touch every person watching this video right now.
